meaning: n.[古生]菊石,干肉粉(作肥料用)
examples: Jephthah sent back messengers to the Ammonite king.
LORIAN LEONHARD, a London violin dealer, keeps a large fossilised ammonite in his showroom.
That a shark with teeth like this would try to make a meal of an ammonite is, at first sight, odd.
Hugo Ashley, from Poulton, and his grandfather also found an ammonite cadoceras, and another Rieneckia ammonite.
She said Dr Hollingworth found another Rieneckia ammonite in a similar quarry in the park several years ago.
